headline: Why Bio-Techne (TECH) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of life sciences company Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) jumped 5.4% in the morning session after TD Cowen reiterated a Buy rating and a $65.00 price target on the stock.
